props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

events.name: onScrollStateChange
events.description: Called whenever the internal scroll state changes (no-scroll → at-top → middle → at-bottom)

slots.name: pageFooter
slots.description: Content rendered in the sticky page footer region.

slots.name: pageHeader
slots.description: Content rendered in the sticky page header region.

slots.name: pushDrawer
slots.description: A GoabPushDrawer rendered as a sibling of the main card, inside the same workspace shell. Use this slot when the page needs a push drawer alongside the workspace layout — it gives the drawer the shell-level height and flex context it expects, so the consumer does not have to wrap the layout in their own flex container. The side menu is not pushed; only the card is.

slots.name: sideMenu
slots.description: Content rendered in the side navigation region (e.g. work-side-menu).
